zh.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: 英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne FitzWilliam於1504年出生在英國時，她的父親William Fitzwilliam44歲，母親Lady Anne Hawes41歲。她於1523年與Sir. Anthony Cooke在英國艾可洛福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國艾可洛福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne FitzWilliam于1504年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Fitzwilliam44岁，母亲Lady Anne Hawes41岁。她于1523年与Sir. Anthony Cooke在英国艾可洛福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国艾可洛福德。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne FitzWilliam was born in 1504, in England, her father, William Fitzwilliam, was 44 and her mother, Lady Anne Hawes, was 41. She married Sir. Anthony Cooke in 1523, in Romford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She was buried in Romford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne FitzWilliam est née en 1504, à Angleterre, son père, William Fitzwilliam, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Hawes, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir. Anthony Cooke en 1523, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elleenterrée à Romford, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスギディー ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Anne FitzWilliamが1504年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Fitzwilliamは44歳，母Lady Anne Hawesは41歳であった。1523年にイギリスエセックスロムフォードでSir. Anthony Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスエセックスロムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne FitzWilliam(이)가 1504년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fitzwilliam(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Hawes(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 Sir. Anthony Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne FitzWilliam nasceu em 1504, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fitzwilliam, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Hawes, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir. Anthony Cooke em 1523, em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ro.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: Gidea Hall, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne FitzWilliam родилась в 1504 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Fitzwilliam было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Hawes, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir. Anthony Cooke в 1523 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия.
